rounds.assistant_text: Hiện tại, không có bài viết mới nào từ tài khoản Facebook của Vũ Đăng Khiêm. Nếu bạn cần thông tin khác hoặc có yêu cầu khác, hãy cho tôi biết!

turns.user: Tom tat bai nay giup minh: https://openai.com/research/
turns.assistant_text:
Here's a summary of the research page from OpenAI:

### Research | OpenAI
OpenAI is focused on pioneering research aimed at achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), which is designed to solve human-level problems. Their mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity.

#### Focus Areas:
- **Deep Learning**: Leveraging large datasets and advanced reasoning to train AI systems for various tasks.
- **GPT Series**: Fast, versatile AI models that understand context, generate content, and reason across text and images.
- **O Series**: Advanced reasoning AI systems that solve complex STEM problems through logical analysis.
- **Visual Research**: Generative modeling for images, including tools like CLIP and DALL-E for creating images from text descriptions.
- **Audio Research**: Applying AI to audio processing and generation.

For more detailed information, you can visit the [OpenAI Research page](https://openai.com/research/).

items.title: Research | OpenAI
items.summary:
Research \| OpenAI

Research

# Pioneering research on the path to AGI

We believe our research will eventually lead to artificial general intelligence, a system that can solve human-level problems. Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity.

[View research index](https://openai.com/research/index/) [Learn about safety](https://openai.com/safety/)

![[2.0] Research > Hero > Media Item](https://downloads.ctfassets.net/kftzwdyauwt9/4FnPiaiJdmc3R04H7kGR4N/8b115455fddf2921431f454f65b6ee22/Research_Hero.png?w=3840&q=90&fm=webp)

Focus areas

### We use Deep Learning to leverage large amounts of data and advanced reasoning to train AI systems for task completion.

### GPT

OpenAI’s GPT series models are fast, versatile, and cost-efficient AI systems designed to understand context, generate content, and reason across text, images, and more.

![Hero Art Card SEO 1x1](https://images.ctfassets.net/kftzwdyauwt9/cut4wyUCuBENXfd5CSI7Z/d934ffb49d8b39abea0bc33bb1a5b916/Hero_Art_Card_SEO_1x1.jpg?w=3840&q=90&fm=webp)

\\
ReleaseMar 3, 20265 min read](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-3-instant/)

### o series

OpenAI’s o series models are advanced reasoning AI systems that use chain-of-thought processes to solve complex STEM problems through logical, step-by-step analysis.

### Visual

Our research on generative modeling for images has led to representation models like CLIP, which makes a map between text and images that an AI can read, and DALL-E, a tool for creating vivid images from text descriptions.
